description: The Point-of-Sale (POS) terminal at a busy concession stand has frozen during an event.

nodes.task_description: Receive a report of the POS failure from the stand manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the issue for the specific terminal.

nodes.task_description: Attempt to remotely reboot the POS terminal.
Dispatch an IT technician to the concession stand with a replacement terminal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches a technician to the location.
